meta.project: InterviewAI - Local Llama 3.2 Powered Interview Platform

product_overview: InterviewAI is a local AI-powered technical interview simulator that grounds questions in an uploaded PDF resume, conducts a multi-turn conversational interview, and generates a comprehensive performance report. The system runs entirely on FastAPI with a local Ollama model and serves a static HTML/CSS/JavaScript frontend.
core_goals: Allow candidates to upload a PDF resume and start an interview session based on parsed resume content.
Conduct an adaptive, resume-grounded technical interview over multiple conversational turns.
Generate a final interview report asynchronously with scores, strengths, weaknesses, and hiring recommendations.
Provide a fully local, lightweight experience using FastAPI and Ollama without requiring external cloud services.
Support a polished, browser-based workflow from upload through interview completion and report review.

features.name: Resume Upload
features.description: Lets a user upload a PDF resume and a target job title so the system can extract resume details and create a new interview session.
user_flows: POST /api/upload with a valid PDF resume and job_title -> Receive 200 with session_id and first_question -> Start the interview session with the returned question
POST /api/upload with a missing resume file or invalid form data -> Receive 400 validation error -> User is prompted to correct the upload and try again
POST /api/upload with a server-side parsing failure -> Receive 500 server error -> User is informed that the interview cannot be started at this time

features.name: Interview Chat
features.description: Handles each conversational turn of the AI interview by accepting the candidate's answer and returning the next question or completion status.
user_flows: POST /api/chat with a valid session_id and answer -> Receive 200 with next question, turn_number, and interview_complete=false -> Continue the interview conversation with the returned question
POST /api/chat with a valid session_id and final answer -> Receive 200 with interview_complete=true -> The session transitions to report generation
POST /api/chat with a missing or malformed session_id/answer -> Receive 400 validation error -> User must resend a properly formatted request
POST /api/chat with an unknown session_id -> Receive 404 not found -> User is informed the interview session no longer exists

features.name: Interview Report
features.description: Fetches the final AI-generated interview report for a completed session, including the candidate evaluation and recommendations.
user_flows: GET /api/report/{session_id} for a completed interview -> Receive 200 with report object -> Display the interview dashboard with score, strengths, weaknesses, and recommendations
GET /api/report/{session_id} immediately after interview completion while the report is still processing -> Receive 202 status generating -> Poll again until the report is ready
GET /api/report/{session_id} with an invalid session_id format -> Receive 400 validation error -> User is prompted to verify the session identifier
GET /api/report/{session_id} for a non-existent session_id -> Receive 404 not found -> User is informed that no report is available for that session

features.name: Resume Upload
features.description: Uploads a PDF resume and parses it to start an interview session

features.name: Interview Chat
features.description: Endpoint for handling conversational turns with the AI

endpoints.description: Submit an answer and get the next question

features.name: Interview Report
features.description: Fetches the final AI-generated report for the interview
